title: Canopy Growth Reports Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth reported Q2 FY2025 results showing mixed performance. In Q2 FY2025, Canopy Growth reported improved adjusted EBITDA performance. Supply issues with Wana edibles impacted the quarter's performance. The company continues to strengthen financial performance with improving adjusted EBITDA, disciplined cost management, and a stronger balance sheet.
